source: AISC Steel Construction Manual v15 dimensions, transcribed via steelpy (Apache-2.0; github.com/evanfaler/steelpy)

field_definitions.kdes_in: Distance from outer flange face to web toe of fillet (design), in
field_definitions.T_in: Distance between fillets (clear web depth), in
field_definitions.ix_in4: Moment of inertia about strong (x) axis, in^4
field_definitions.sx_in3: Elastic section modulus, strong axis, in^3
field_definitions.zx_in3: Plastic section modulus, strong axis, in^3
field_definitions.rx_in: Radius of gyration, strong axis, in
field_definitions.iy_in4: Moment of inertia about weak (y) axis, in^4
field_definitions.sy_in3: Elastic section modulus, weak axis, in^3
field_definitions.zy_in3: Plastic section modulus, weak axis, in^3
field_definitions.ry_in: Radius of gyration, weak axis, in
